items.prompt: A good order of operations is…
choices: Backup (or dry-run list), then clean generated dirs
items.explain: Backup first; list clean targets; only then delete.

choices: You can keep multiple versions without overwriting
items.explain: date stamps avoid clobbering earlier backups.

items.prompt: Excluding build/ and logs/ from a source backup keeps archives smaller and more shareable.
items.explain: Generated artifacts are rebuildable; sources are what you need to restore.

items.prompt: Before find … -delete on build/, you should…
choices: List the files first with find (no -delete)
items.explain: List to confirm paths; delete only when sure.
